# Tech Context

## Language & Versions

- **Language:** Swift
- **Minimum Deployment:** macOS 13.0 (from `Info.plist` LSMinimumSystemVersion)
- **IDE/Toolchain:** Xcode (`.xcodeproj` based)

## Dependencies

| Dependency | Version | Purpose |
|------------|---------|---------|
| Ollama (external runtime) | N/A | Local LLM inference server, accessed via HTTP API at `localhost:11434` |

No third-party Swift dependencies. Uses only Apple frameworks:

| Framework | Used In | Purpose |
|-----------|---------|---------|
| `Foundation` | `OllamaClient.swift`, `AppSettings.swift`, `TranslationService.swift` | Networking (`URLSession`), `UserDefaults`, JSON coding |
| `SwiftUI` | `TranslateView.swift`, `SettingsView.swift`, `TranslationService.swift`, `MenuBarController.swift` | UI views, `@Published`/`@StateObject` bindings |
| `Cocoa` | `AppDelegate.swift`, `MenuBarController.swift` | `NSApplication`, `NSStatusItem`, `NSPopover`, `NSEvent`, `NSPasteboard` |
| `Combine` | `AppSettings.swift`, `TranslationService.swift`, `SettingsView.swift` | `ObservableObject` protocol (not using publishers directly) |

## Package Manager

None. No SPM (`Package.swift`), no CocoaPods (`Podfile`), no Carthage.

## Build Configuration

- **Project type:** Xcode `.xcodeproj` (no workspace)
- **Schemes:** Default FastTranslate scheme
- **Configurations:** Debug, Release (Xcode defaults)
- **Info.plist keys:**
  - `LSUIElement = true` — hides Dock icon
  - `NSAllowsLocalNetworking = true` — permits HTTP to localhost (Ollama)

## Project Structure

```
FastTranslate/
├── FastTranslate.xcodeproj/
├── FastTranslate/
│   ├── Assets.xcassets/
│   │   ├── AccentColor.colorset/
│   │   └── AppIcon.appiconset/
│   ├── Resources/
│   │   └── Info.plist
│   └── Sources/
│       ├── AppDelegate.swift
│       ├── AppSettings.swift
│       ├── MenuBarController.swift
│       ├── OllamaClient.swift
│       ├── SettingsView.swift
│       ├── TranslateView.swift
│       └── TranslationService.swift
└── memory-bank/
```

## Environment Setup

1. Install [Ollama](https://ollama.com) and run `ollama serve`
2. Pull a model: `ollama pull qwen2.5:7b` (default model in settings)
3. Open `FastTranslate.xcodeproj` in Xcode
4. Build and run (macOS 13.0+)

## CI/CD

None configured.
